name_cn:
SIDE TRUNK Handbag #️⃣M46358
Exclusive global launch! This model features French craftsmanship, dynamic chip changing, original factory exclusive fabric, and original factory electroplated gold-plated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
For comparison, please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% authenticity! Original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website latest gift box!
21 x 14 x 6 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Worn cowhide trim
Microfiber lining
Hardware
Zipper closure with side S-lock
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 53.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 58.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, removable
Made in France
